name: cdk-gitlab-runner

metadata.name: cdk-gitlab-runner
metadata.summary: Use AWS CDK to create a gitlab runner, and use gitlab runner to help you execute your Gitlab pipeline job.

classes.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunner

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunner.__init__
documentation:
---
param concurrent_jobs: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner concurrent job configuration.
  Default: - concurrentJobs=1'
param docker_volumes: '(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes
  Path at job runner runtime. more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>
  Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"'
param ebs_size: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size . Default: - ebsSize=60'
param ec2iamrole: '(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance . Default:
  - new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy
  .'
param ec2type: '(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: - t3.micro'
param enabled_imd_sv2: '(experimental) Enabled IMDSv2. more detail see <https://docs.aws.amazon.com/zh_tw/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/configuring-instance-metadata-service.html>
  Default: - false'
param gitlab_runner_image: '(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner. Default: public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest
  !!! \<--- latest now > 16.0 Gitlab Runner version'
param gitlab_runner_version: (experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab
  runner version.
param gitlabtoken: '(experimental) Gitlab token for the Register Runner . Default:
  - You must to give the token !!!'
param gitlaburl: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - gitlaburl=''<https://gitlab.com/>''
  , please use <https://yourgitlab.com/> do not use <https://yourgitlab.com>'
param id: '-'
param instance_interruption_behavior: '(experimental) The behavior when a Spot Runner
  Instance is interrupted. Default: - InstanceInterruptionBehavior.TERMINATE , !!!
  only support spotfleet runner !!! .'
param key_name: '(experimental) SSH key name. Default: - no ssh key will be assigned
  , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .'
param runner_description: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner description. Default: - runnerDescription=''Docker
  Runner'''
param scope: '-'
param selfvpc: '(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner . Default: - new VPC will
  be created , 1 Vpc , 2 Public Subnet .'
param spot_fleet: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance Use Spot Fleet or not ?!.
  Default: - spotFleet=false'
param tags: '(experimental) tags for the runner Unsupported Gitlab Runner 15.10 and
  later. Default: - [''runner'', ''gitlab'', ''awscdk'']'
param valid_until: '(experimental) the time when the spot fleet allocation expires.
  Default: - no expiration , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .'
param vpc_subnet: '(experimental) VPC subnet for the spot fleet. Default: - public
  subnet'
stability: experimental
---

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunner.create_user_data
documentation:
---
param props: '-'
param token_parameter_store_name: '- the tokenParameterStoreName to put gitlab runner
  token.'
return: Array.
stability: experimental
---

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.__init__
documentation:
(experimental) GitlabContainerRunner Props.

```
param gitlab_runner_version

(experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab runner version.

param gitlabtoken

(experimental) Gitlab token for the Register Runner . Default: - You must to give the token !!!

param concurrent_jobs

(experimental) Gitlab Runner concurrent job configuration. Default: - concurrentJobs=1

param docker_volumes

(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at job runner runtime. more detail see https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"

param ebs_size

(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size . Default: - ebsSize=60

param ec2iamrole

(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance . Default: - new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy .

param ec2type

(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: - t3.micro

param enabled_imd_sv2

(experimental) Enabled IMDSv2. more detail see https://docs.aws.amazon.com/zh_tw/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/configuring-instance-metadata-service.html Default: - false

param gitlab_runner_image

(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner. Default: public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest !!! <--- latest now > 16.0 Gitlab Runner version

param gitlaburl

(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - gitlaburl='https://gitlab.com/' , please use https://yourgitlab.com/ do not use https://yourgitlab.com

param instance_interruption_behavior

(experimental) The behavior when a Spot Runner Instance is interrupted. Default: - InstanceInterruptionBehavior.TERMINATE , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

param key_name

(experimental) SSH key name. Default: - no ssh key will be assigned , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

param runner_description

(experimental) Gitlab Runner description. Default: - runnerDescription='Docker Runner'

param selfvpc

(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner . Default: - new VPC will be created , 1 Vpc , 2 Public Subnet .

param spot_fleet

(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance Use Spot Fleet or not ?!. Default: - spotFleet=false

param tags

(experimental) tags for the runner Unsupported Gitlab Runner 15.10 and later. Default: - ['runner', 'gitlab', 'awscdk']

param valid_until

(experimental) the time when the spot fleet allocation expires. Default: - no expiration , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

param vpc_subnet

(experimental) VPC subnet for the spot fleet. Default: - public subnet

stability

experimental
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.gitlab_runner_version
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab runner version.

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.gitlabtoken
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab token for the Register Runner .

```
default

You must to give the token !!!

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN' });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.concurrent_jobs
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner concurrent job configuration.

```
default

concurrentJobs=1

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',concurrentJobs: 3});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.docker_volumes
documentation:
(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at job runner runtime.

more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>

```
default

already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
dockerVolumes: [
  {
    hostPath: '/tmp/cache',
    containerPath: '/tmp/cache',
  },
],
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.ebs_size
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size .

```
default

ebsSize=60

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',ebsSize: 100});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.ec2iamrole
documentation:
(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance .

```
default

new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy .

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const role = new Role(stack, 'runner-role', {
  assumedBy: new ServicePrincipal('ec2.amazonaws.com'),
  description: 'For Gitlab EC2 Runner Test Role',
  roleName: 'Myself-Runner-Role',
});

new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', ec2iamrole: role });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.ec2type
documentation:
(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type.

```
default

t3.micro

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', ec2type: 't3.small' });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.enabled_imd_sv2
documentation:
(experimental) Enabled IMDSv2.

more detail see https://docs.aws.amazon.com/zh_tw/AWSEC2/latest/UserGuide/configuring-instance-metadata-service.html

:default: - false

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.gitlab_runner_image
documentation:
(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner.

```
default

public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest !!! <--- latest now > 16.0 Gitlab Runner version

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', gitlabRunnerImage: 'gitlab/gitlab-runner:alpine' });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.gitlaburl
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url .

```
default

gitlaburl='https://gitlab.com/' , please use https://yourgitlab.com/ do not use https://yourgitlab.com

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',gitlaburl: 'https://gitlab.com/'});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.instance_interruption_behavior
documentation:
(experimental) The behavior when a Spot Runner Instance is interrupted.

:default: - InstanceInterruptionBehavior.TERMINATE , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.key_name
documentation:
(experimental) SSH key name.

:default: - no ssh key will be assigned , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.runner_description
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner description.

```
default

runnerDescription='Docker Runner'

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',runnerDescription: 'Simple GitLab Runner'});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.selfvpc
documentation:
(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner .

```
default

new VPC will be created , 1 Vpc , 2 Public Subnet .

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const newvpc = new Vpc(stack, 'NEWVPC', {
  ipAddresses: IpAddresses.cidr('10.0.0.0/16'),
  maxAzs: 2,
  subnetConfiguration: [{
    cidrMask: 26,
    name: 'RunnerVPC',
    subnetType: SubnetType.PUBLIC,
  }],
  natGateways: 0,
});

new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', selfvpc: newvpc });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.spot_fleet
documentation:
(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance Use Spot Fleet or not ?!.

```
default

spotFleet=false

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabContainerRunner(stack, 'runner', { gitlabtoken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',spotFleet: true});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.tags
documentation:
(experimental) tags for the runner Unsupported Gitlab Runner 15.10 and later.

:default: - ['runner', 'gitlab', 'awscdk']

:see: - https://docs.gitlab.com/ee/ci/runners/new_creation_workflow.html
:stability: experimental

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabContainerRunnerProps.valid_until
documentation:
(experimental) the time when the spot fleet allocation expires.

:default: - no expiration , !!! only support spotfleet runner !!! .

:stability: experimental

classes.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscaling

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscaling.__init__
documentation:
---
param alarms: '(experimental) Parameters of put_metric_alarm function. <https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/reference/services/cloudwatch.html#CloudWatch.Client.put_metric_alarm>
  Default: - [{ AlarmName: ''GitlabRunnerDiskUsage'', MetricName: ''disk_used_percent'',
  }]'
param desired_capacity: '(experimental) Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group.
  Default: - minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment'
param docker_volumes: '(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes
  Path at job runner runtime. more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>
  Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"'
param ebs_size: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size . Default: - ebsSize=60'
param gitlab_runner_image: '(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner. Default: public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest'
param gitlab_runner_version: (experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab
  runner version.
param gitlab_token: (experimental) Gitlab token.
param gitlab_url: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - <https://gitlab.com/>
  , The trailing slash is mandatory.'
param id: '-'
param instance_role: '(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance . Default:
  - new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy
  .'
param instance_type: '(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: -
  t3.micro'
param max_capacity: '(experimental) Maximum capacity limit for autoscaling group.
  Default: - desiredCapacity'
param min_capacity: '(experimental) Minimum capacity limit for autoscaling group.
  Default: - minCapacity: 1'
param scope: '-'
param spot_instance: '(experimental) Run worker nodes as EC2 Spot. Default: - false'
param tags: '(experimental) tags for the runner. Default: - [''runner'', ''gitlab'',
  ''awscdk'']'
param vpc: '(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner . Default: - A new VPC will be
  created.'
param vpc_subnet: '(experimental) VPC subnet. Default: - SubnetType.PRIVATE subnet'
stability: experimental
---

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscaling.create_user_data
documentation:
---
param alarms: '(experimental) Parameters of put_metric_alarm function. <https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/reference/services/cloudwatch.html#CloudWatch.Client.put_metric_alarm>
  Default: - [{ AlarmName: ''GitlabRunnerDiskUsage'', MetricName: ''disk_used_percent'',
  }]'
param desired_capacity: '(experimental) Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group.
  Default: - minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment'
param docker_volumes: '(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes
  Path at job runner runtime. more detail see <https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section>
  Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"'
param ebs_size: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size . Default: - ebsSize=60'
param gitlab_runner_image: '(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner. Default: public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest'
param gitlab_runner_version: (experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab
  runner version.
param gitlab_token: (experimental) Gitlab token.
param gitlab_url: '(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - <https://gitlab.com/>
  , The trailing slash is mandatory.'
param instance_role: '(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance . Default:
  - new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy
  .'
param instance_type: '(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: -
  t3.micro'
param max_capacity: '(experimental) Maximum capacity limit for autoscaling group.
  Default: - desiredCapacity'

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.__init__
documentation:
(experimental) GitlabRunnerAutoscaling Props.

```
param gitlab_runner_version

(experimental) Gitlab Runner version Please give me gitlab runner version.

param gitlab_token

(experimental) Gitlab token.

param alarms

(experimental) Parameters of put_metric_alarm function. https://boto3.amazonaws.com/v1/documentation/api/latest/reference/services/cloudwatch.html#CloudWatch.Client.put_metric_alarm Default: - [{ AlarmName: 'GitlabRunnerDiskUsage', MetricName: 'disk_used_percent', }]

param desired_capacity

(experimental) Desired capacity limit for autoscaling group. Default: - minCapacity, and leave unchanged during deployment

param docker_volumes

(experimental) add another Gitlab Container Runner Docker Volumes Path at job runner runtime. more detail see https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/configuration/advanced-configuration.html#the-runnersdocker-section Default: - already mount "/var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock"

param ebs_size

(experimental) Gitlab Runner instance EBS size . Default: - ebsSize=60

param gitlab_runner_image

(experimental) Image URL of Gitlab Runner. Default: public.ecr.aws/gitlab/gitlab-runner:latest

param gitlab_url

(experimental) Gitlab Runner register url . Default: - https://gitlab.com/ , The trailing slash is mandatory.

param instance_role

(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance . Default: - new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy .

param instance_type

(experimental) Runner default EC2 instance type. Default: - t3.micro

param max_capacity

(experimental) Maximum capacity limit for autoscaling group. Default: - desiredCapacity

param min_capacity

(experimental) Minimum capacity limit for autoscaling group. Default: - minCapacity: 1

param spot_instance

(experimental) Run worker nodes as EC2 Spot. Default: - false

param tags

(experimental) tags for the runner. Default: - ['runner', 'gitlab', 'awscdk']

param vpc

(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner . Default: - A new VPC will be created.

param vpc_subnet

(experimental) VPC subnet. Default: - SubnetType.PRIVATE subnet

stability

experimental
```

```
default

https://gitlab.com/ , The trailing slash is mandatory.

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const runner = new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN',gitlabUrl: 'https://gitlab.com/'});
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.instance_role
documentation:
(experimental) IAM role for the Gitlab Runner Instance .

```
default

new Role for Gitlab Runner Instance , attach AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore Policy .

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const role = new Role(stack, 'runner-role', {
  assumedBy: new ServicePrincipal('ec2.amazonaws.com'),
  description: 'For Gitlab Runner Test Role',
  roleName: 'Runner-Role',
});

new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', instanceRole: role });
```

methods.name: cdk_gitlab_runner.GitlabRunnerAutoscalingProps.vpc
documentation:
(experimental) VPC for the Gitlab Runner .

```
default

A new VPC will be created.

stability

experimental
```

Example:

```
const newVpc = new Vpc(stack, 'NewVPC', {
  ipAddresses: IpAddresses.cidr('10.0.0.0/16'),
  maxAzs: 2,
  subnetConfiguration: [{
    cidrMask: 26,
    name: 'RunnerVPC',
    subnetType: SubnetType.PUBLIC,
  }],
  natGateways: 0,
});

new GitlabRunnerAutoscaling(stack, 'runner', { gitlabToken: 'GITLAB_TOKEN', vpc: newVpc });
```
